$schema: NPC dialogue table for the walk scene (Task 19). Slots: greeter, guide-wait, guide-arrive ({landmark} token). landmarks steer the guide NPC.
greeter: Welcome to the beach — mind the warm sand.
Hey there. The water's perfect today.
Glad you came down. Grab a parasol if the sun's too much.
Welcome in. The tide's calm, the view's all yours.
guide-wait: Take your time — I'll wait by the shoreline.
No rush, the waves keep good company.
I'll hold here in the shade until you're ready.
guide-arrive: This is {landmark}. Best seat on the coast.
Welcome to {landmark}. Listen to that surf.
